reason: The text does emphasize a contrast between chaos and order. Initially, there is chaos as the word of the LORD was precious in those days with no open vision, Eli's eyes were dim, and there was confusion about who was calling Samuel. However, order is established as Samuel eventually responds to the call of the LORD, listens and obeys, becomes a prophet of the LORD, and brings forth the word of the LORD to all Israel. The chaos of the defeat in battle and loss of the ark gives way to order as Samuel emerges as a leader.
